{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Heart manual
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Heart manual]] contains a cycling technique intended to prepare the user for splitting their core and improving [[pure madra]] manipulation.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c7">''Unsouled'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
